## Selected projects in data science, machine learning and NLP

---

### DeepNLP: A Python Library for Natural Language Processing Tasks

DeepNLP is a library for Natural Language Processing in python. It provides a unified framework to perform NLP tasks such as Named Entity Recognition, Dependency Parsing, Part-of-Speech Tagging, Relation Extraction, Semantic Role Labeling, and so on. Most models are based on BERT.

[![Python badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-white?logo=Python)](#) [![PyTorch badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/PyTorch-white?logo=pytorch)](#) [![BERT badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/BERT-white?logo=google)](#) [![HF badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hugging%20Face%20Transformers-white?logo=huggingface)](#)

It can be installed and use right away like so:

```python
from DeepNLP.model.DPOS import DPOS
deepnlp = DPOS.load_model(model_path='bert-base-cased', no_cuda=False)
```

[View code upon request](https://www.linkedin.com/in/eliwangjq)

---

### AutoGen: An Automated Datasets Generation Framework

The AutoGen (analyticsdf) is a Python library that allows you to generate synthetic data with any statistical characteristics desired. Out of this project, I co-authored a research paper selected for publication and presentation at the ASEE Conference.

[![Python Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-white?logo=Python)](#) [![Apache Spark badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Apache%20Spark-white?logo=apachespark&logoColor=%23E25A1C)](#) [![pandas badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/pandas-white?logo=data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%2CPD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIiBlbmNvZGluZz0iVVRGLTgiIHN0YW5kYWxvbmU9Im5vIj8%%2BCiAgICA8cmRmOlJERj4KICAgICAgPGNjOldvcmsKICAgICAgICAgcmRmOmFib3V0PSIiPgogICAgICAgIDxkYzpmb3JtYXQ%2BaW1hZ2Uvc3ZnK3htbDwvZGM6Zm9ybWF0PgogICAgICAgIDxkYzp0eXBlCiAgICAgICAgICAgcmRmOnJlc291cmNlPSJodHRwOi8vcHVybC5vcmcvZGMvZGNtaXR5cGUvU3RpbGxJbWFnZSIgLz4KICAgICAgPC9jYzpXb3JrPgogICAgPC9yZGY6UkRGPgogIDwvbWV0YWRhdGE%%2BCiAgPGRlZnMKICAgICBpZD0iZGVmczQiPgogICAgPHN0eWxlCiAgICAgICBpZD0ic3R5bGUyIj4uY2xzLTF7ZmlsbDojMTMwNzU0O30uY2xzLTJ7ZmlsbDojNDhlNWFjO30uY2xzLTN7ZmlsbDojZTcwNDg4O308L3N0eWxlPgogIDwvZGVmcz4KICA8dGl0bGUKICAgICBpZD0idGl0bGU2Ij5BcnRib2FyZCA2MTwvdGl0bGU%%2BCiAgPHJlY3QKICAgICBjbGFzcz0iY2xzLTEiCiAgICAgeD0iMTEyLjQxIgogICAgIHk9Ijg0LjIxIgogICAgIHdpZHRoPSIyNC4wOSIKICAgICBoZWlnaHQ9IjUwLjAyIgogICAgIGlkPSJyZWN0MTgiIC8%2BCiAgPHJlY3QKICAgICBjbGFzcz0iY2xzLTMiCiAgICAgeD0iMTEyLjQxIgogICAgIHk9IjE0OC44NCIKICAgICB3aWR0aD0iMjQuMDkiCiAgICAgaGVpZ2h0PSIyMy42IgogICAgIGlkPSJyZWN0MjAiIC8%2BCiAgPHJlY3QKICAgICBjbGFzcz0iY2xzLTEiCiAgICAgeD0iMTUwLjMiCiAgICAgeT0iMzAiCiAgICAgd2lkdGg9IjI0LjA5IgogICAgIGhlaWdodD0iMTY2LjI3IgogICAgIGlkPSJyZWN0MjIiIC8%2BCjwvc3ZnPgo%3D)](#)

##### Publication:
Wilcox, B., Wang, J., et al. (2023, June), _“Automated Analytic Dataset Generation and Assessment for Engineering Analytics Education”_, Paper presented at 2023 ASEE Annual Conference & Exposition, Baltimore, Maryland. 10.18260/1-2—42350

---

### Recommender: Food Review Recommendation System

I built a recommendation system based on user profiles and food reviews using **collaborative filtering**.

[![Python Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-white?logo=Python)](#) [![Jupyter Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Jupyter-white?logo=Jupyter)](#) [![Apache Spark badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Apache%20Spark-white?logo=apachespark&logoColor=%23E25A1C)](#) [![pandas badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/pandas-white?logo=data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%2CPD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIiBlbmNvZGluZz0iVVRGLTgiIHN0YW5kYWxvbmU9Im5vIj8%%2BCiAgICA8cmRmOlJERj4KICAgICAgPGNjOldvcmsKICAgICAgICAgcmRmOmFib3V0PSIiPgogICAgICAgIDxkYzpmb3JtYXQ%2BaW1hZ2Uvc3ZnK3htbDwvZGM6Zm9ybWF0PgogICAgICAgIDxkYzp0eXBlCiAgICAgICAgICAgcmRmOnJlc291cmNlPSJodHRwOi8vcHVybC5vcmcvZGMvZGNtaXR5cGUvU3RpbGxJbWFnZSIgLz4KICAgICAgPC9jYzpXb3JrPgogICAgPC9yZGY6UkRGPgogIDwvbWV0YWRhdGE%%2BCiAgPGRlZnMKICAgICBpZD0iZGVmczQiPgogICAgPHN0eWxlCiAgICAgICBpZD0ic3R5bGUyIj4uY2xzLTF7ZmlsbDojMTMwNzU0O30uY2xzLTJ7ZmlsbDojNDhlNWFjO30uY2xzLTN7ZmlsbDojZTcwNDg4O308L3N0eWxlPgogIDwvZGVmcz4KICA8dGl0bGUKICAgICBpZD0idGl0bGU2Ij5BcnRib2FyZCA2MTwvdGl0bGU%%2BCiAgPHJlY3QKICAgICBjbGFzcz0iY2xzLTEiCiAgICAgeD0iMTEyLjQxIgogICAgIHk9Ijg0LjIxIgogICAgIHdpZHRoPSIyNC4wOSIKICAgICBoZWlnaHQ9IjUwLjAyIgogICAgIGlkPSJyZWN0MTgiIC8%2BCiAgPHJlY3QKICAgICBjbGFzcz0iY2xzLTMiCiAgICAgeD0iMTEyLjQxIgogICAgIHk9IjE0OC44NCIKICAgICB3aWR0aD0iMjQuMDkiCiAgICAgaGVpZ2h0PSIyMy42IgogICAgIGlkPSJyZWN0MjAiIC8%2BCiAgPHJlY3QKICAgICBjbGFzcz0iY2xzLTEiCiAgICAgeD0iMTUwLjMiCiAgICAgeT0iMzAiCiAgICAgd2lkdGg9IjI0LjA5IgogICAgIGhlaWdodD0iMTY2LjI3IgogICAgIGlkPSJyZWN0MjIiIC8%2BCjwvc3ZnPgo%3D)](#) [![Numpy Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/NumPy-white?logo=data:image/png;base64,)](#)


[View code on GitHub](https://github.com/eliwangj/review-recommendation-system)

---

### Predictive Analysis: Which news article is going to go viral?
The goal of this project is to leverage data mining and machine learning techniques to predict the popularity (indicated by the amount of shares) of certain news articles.

[![R Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/R-white?logo=r&logoColor=%23276DC3)](#) [![Python Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-white?logo=Python)](#)

[View code on GitHub](https://github.com/eliwangj/digital-news)
